title: Head Shoulders Knees and Toes
objective: Learn body parts through movement, song, and tracing

data.text: Touch your head, shoulders, knees, and toes as you sing along.

data.title: Head Shoulders Knees and Toes
data.fallbackText: Head shoulders knees and toes. Knees and toes. Head shoulders knees and toes. Eyes and ears and mouth and nose.

data.question: Which body part comes after shoulders in the song?
data.hint: Listen to the order: head, shoulders, knees, and toes.

data.guide: Follow the dotted letters and say the body part.

data.prompt: Name one more body part from the song.
data.hint: You heard eyes, ears, mouth, and nose too.
